---
title: "About"
---

I am Nhat Minh Nguyen, an Economics student at Lawrence University. My academic and professional interests include entrepreneur, data analytics, business analytics, and technology.

I enjoy working on projects that connect data with real-world decision-making. Through my coursework and internship experience, I have developed skills in R, SQL, GitHub, Power BI, GA4, and AI.

## Skills

- R
- Python
- Git
- Power BI
- GA4
- Claude Code (MCP integration and harness/ prompt engineer)

## Experiences

### Data Analyst Intern — FPT Telecom
- Conducted data analysis to identify data quality issues and support business decisions.
- Built automated data pipelines to improve reporting workflow and dashboard updates.
- Developed interactive dashboards to track business performance and support managers.

### Business Analyst Intern — VMO
- Analyzed business and sales pipelines to improve operational efficiency.
- Researched competitors and market trends across targeted industries.
- Prepared data-driven presentations with key findings and recommendations.

### Business Development — Aforai
- Supported early-stage strategy, positioning, and go-to-market planning.
- Worked with co-founders to define growth strategies and build market traction.
- Helped execute marketing campaigns that supported user growth and revenue.

### Community Manager — Ambros Technology
- Managed online community channels across multiple projects.
- Planned and supported community events, campaigns, and engagement activities.
- Collaborated with executives, developers, and marketing teams on cross-functional projects.

### Business Development — Kryptos Media
- Conducted market research and competitive analysis for partnership opportunities.
- Identified potential collaborations across relevant industry sectors.
- Consult and connect porjects to projects - projects to agency
- Support blockchain start ups to build strategy for launchpad and Initial Token Offering
## Interests

Outside of class, I am interested in startups and technology products, arts . I enjoy learning how data can help organizations understand users and make better decisions.
